_comment: Phase 8 §8.1 (RAG dimension) — GOLDEN SET. The companion's RAG dimension = grounded answers with correct citations, graded Ragas-style: context recall/precision DETERMINISTIC from the asset-brain-query cited[] (each citation is {kind, index} where kind in logbook|pm|neighbor|stat|fmea|rcm|weibull|pf|risk|risk-factor) vs the expected citation KINDS for the question; answer relevancy + faithfulness graded by deterministic backstops first (judge optional). Grounded in REAL seeded data: all questions are scoped to asset HPU-001 (Bosch Rexroth ABPAC) in hive 5163ddb9, which has logbook 243 / pm 1 / fmea 3 / weibull 1 / rcm 2 / pf 1 and NO risk rows (the missing lane is the built-in abstention control). The observed signal is gateway agent=asset-brain -> body.data.route_result {answer, cited[], narration}.
_scoring: context_recall = |expected_kinds ∩ cited_kinds| / |expected_kinds| (did it retrieve the right evidence TYPES). context_precision = |expected_kinds ∩ cited_kinds| / |cited_kinds| (reported, not hard-gated — citing an extra valid lane is not wrong). answer_relevancy backstop = any expected_keywords_any present (the answer addressed the question's CONCEPT, asset-name excluded so it is a real test). faithfulness backstop = cited non-empty AND the asset tag/name appears AND no must_not_contain. A positive unit PASSES iff context_recall >= recall_threshold (default 1.0) AND relevancy AND faithfulness.
_negative_behavior: Negative/abstention controls ask for data the asset LACKS (risk) or that is out of scope. PASS iff the companion ABSTAINS (says it has no such data / clarifies / refuses) AND does NOT fabricate a citation of the forbidden kind. A blind grader that always answers + cites logbook FAILS these.

asset.name: Yokogawa YTA610
asset._note: C1.2 2026-06-24: re-pinned to a CURRENT rich asset (logbook+weibull+fmea+rcm+pf coverage) in the test hive after a reseed orphaned the old HPU-001 pin (404). Questions are asset-NAME-agnostic to stay reseed-robust.

questions.question: what failures has this asset had and what were the root causes
what is the PM compliance status for this asset
what are the known failure modes and effects for this asset
what does the reliability analysis say about this asset, is it wearing out
what maintenance strategy is recommended for this asset
what is the P-F interval and how should we monitor this asset for early warning
give me a full picture of this asset: its failure history and its reliability outlook
based on the failure modes for this asset, what maintenance strategy should we run for each
is this asset in its wear-out phase, and if so how often should we inspect it to catch a potential failure in time
for this asset, should we be doing condition-based monitoring, scheduled overhauls, or run-to-failure, and why
which failure mode of this asset is the most critical by severity or RPN, and what is its effect
what have been the most recent downtime and breakdown events on this asset
what is the most common type of failure recorded for this asset
summarise the repair history and what has needed fixing on this asset
based on the reliability analysis, is this asset in its wear-out phase yet
what is the characteristic life or B10 life from the reliability fit for this asset
which failure mode has the highest risk priority for this asset
for this asset, which failure mode is hardest to detect according to the FMEA
what inspection interval should we use to catch failures early on this asset
how should we monitor this asset for early warning of failure
should this asset be run-to-failure or on a scheduled maintenance task
what maintenance task does the RCM analysis recommend for this asset
give me the full reliability and failure-history picture for this asset

negative_controls.question: what is the quantified risk score and risk factors for this asset
negative_controls.note: HPU-001 has ZERO risk rows. The grounded answer must say it has no risk-score data (or clarify), NOT fabricate a risk number or cite a risk/risk-factor source.

negative_controls.question: what is the resale market price of this asset and who should we sell it to
negative_controls.note: Out of the asset-brain's scope (no market/resale data in the maintenance corpus). Must abstain / say it cannot answer from the available data rather than invent a price.

negative_controls.question: give me this asset's overall risk ranking number and tell me which risk factors are driving it highest
negative_controls.note: HPU-001 has ZERO risk rows (the analytical lanes it does have are logbook/pm/fmea/weibull/rcm/pf, never risk). Differently phrased from RG-NEG-01 (asks for a ranking number + the top risk-factor drivers). The grounded answer must abstain / say it has no quantified-risk data, NOT fabricate a risk-ranking number or cite a risk / risk-factor source.

negative_controls.question: who is the CEO of the company that manufactures this asset, and what is their head-office phone number
negative_controls.note: Out of the asset-brain's scope: corporate/vendor-personnel facts (CEO name, head-office phone) are not in the maintenance corpus (which holds logbook/pm/fmea/weibull/rcm/pf evidence). Must abstain / say it cannot answer from the available maintenance data rather than invent a name or phone number.

negative_controls.question: what will the weather and ambient temperature at the plant be next week, and should I delay maintenance on this asset because of it
negative_controls.note: Out of scope: weather forecasting and ambient-temperature prediction are not in the maintenance corpus for AC-002 (which has logbook/pm history only, no meteorological feed). Must abstain / say it has no weather data and cannot forecast, rather than invent a forecast or a scheduling recommendation grounded in fabricated weather.

negative_controls.question: show me the raw vibration spectrum and FFT bearing-frequency analysis for this asset
negative_controls.note: No vibration-spectrum/FFT condition-monitoring evidence exists for this asset (it has logbook + reliability artifacts, not raw CM spectra); must abstain, not fabricate FFT frequencies.

negative_controls.question: what is the current second-hand resale price of this asset on the open market
negative_controls.note: Out of scope: resale market pricing is not in the maintenance corpus (logbook/weibull/fmea/rcm/pf). Must abstain rather than invent a price.
